text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week and I pay a visit to a local shrine.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hrrrmmm!
choice_data_list: That's some serious praying you're doing there.
That's some serious praying you're doing there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you noticed? Actually, things have been
kinda... strange for me lately.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm having nightmares, my shoelaces keep coming
undone—stuff like that. I've been nothing but
unlucky lately...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So I figure my only choice is to pray!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Please send me good fortune!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week appears to seriously be troubled.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Thank you! I'm sure this will be more
effective than if I pray on my own!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I pray with Special Week for good fortune.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew... That should do it! Now then, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz, bzzz.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, it's an email from my mom.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I can't believe it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My mom's gonna send me some delicious crab!
Hehe, it looks like we've already been blessed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The timely blessing puts Special Week in good
spirits.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hrrrmmm! Phew... Okay, that should do it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Now that we're done praying, let's head ba—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Coo! Coo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Gross! Did that pigeon just poop on me?!
T-trainer, heeelp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Unfortunately, it seems like Special Week's luck
has run out.
